mapper.select: SELECT session_id, user_id, device_id, device_name, platform, app_version, refresh_token_hash, refresh_token_expires_at, session_status, login_ip, last_active_at, revoked_at, revoke_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_auth.auth_session WHERE refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash}
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_auth.auth_session SET session_status = 'LOGGED_OUT', revoked_at = #{now}, revoke_reason = #{reason}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash} AND session_status = 'ACTIVE'
